text:

Log:
  Update to 2.0

  - Update COMMENT, pkg-descr, and DESKTOP_ENTRIES.

  Also, while here:
  - Pet portclippy & portfmt.
  - Simplify do-install.
  - Update installation path for manpages.

  Submitted by:	Alfonso S. Siciliano <alfix86@gmail.com>
